subTitle: Jethalal is in for a surprise when Shetty visits his electronic store and is impressed with his salesmanship. Soon, Jethalal is thrilled as Shetty places a huge order with him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Babu Chipke is annoyed when Jethalal keeps criticising his every move. Soon, he decides not to do any of society's work, much to the other residents' dismay.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The society door of Gokuldham breaks and the members of the society try to fix it by sticking the broken pieces together using a powerful adhesive. Later, Champaklal accidentally gets stuck to the door.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: With the men and children off to their parties, the women of Gokuldham Society decide to celebrate New Year with each other.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is pleased when he starts off the new year by seeing Babita. However, his pleasant mood is ruined when Bhide stops by and asks him to pay his maintenance bill.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A big crowd forms outside Jethalal's store when they begin selling a brand new trype of phone. Soon, Tappu asks Jethalal to reserve one model for him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
